questions.q: How many times does the digit '1' appear if you write out all integers from 1 to 20?
A rope ladder hangs over the side of a ship. Rungs are 12 inches apart and the lowest rung just touches the water. The tide rises 1 foot per hour. How long until the water reaches the 5th rung?
choices: The ship rises with the tide — the 5th rung is never covered

questions.q: Paulie is Paul's son, but Paul is not Paulie's father. How is this possible?

A man walks into a bar and asks for a glass of water. The bartender pulls out a gun and points it at him. The man says 'Thank you' and walks out. Why?
choices: The man had hiccups; the sudden scare cured them
The man is an undercover police officer
The gun was actually a water pistol
The man and bartender were rehearsing a play
